name: Potato Devil's Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening until smooth.
2. Add sugar, melted chocolate (over hot water), and mashed potatoes to the mixture. Beat thoroughly.
3. Incorporate the egg yolk and evaporated milk. Mix well.
4. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Gradually add this dry mixture to the batter, stirring constantly.
5. Beat in the vanilla extract until fully incorporated.
6. Add the chopped nuts and mix gently.
7. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
8. Pour the batter into greased layer cake pans.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
